title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map grew new paths
gist.blurb: The API reference has been freshly pollinated from the production OpenAPI spec. Fewer stale signposts, more accurate routes through the garden.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference reflects the latest deployed endpoints and schemas.
gist.impact: Developers get an up-to-date API reference that matches what is running in production.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy documentation garden: Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, updates a large pixel API map beside a retro terminal while fresh code-leaves and labeled route signposts sprout from flower pots. The scene represents production API changes being copied into a reliable public reference.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully pinning fresh code-leaves onto a large API map beside a glowing retro terminal; little code-plants and route signposts bloom from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle pixel-font text: 'API DOCS', emotionally warm and inviting.
